name: Cumin Rice & Black Beans
recipeIngredient: 14 1/2 oz can chicken broth (plus enough water to equal 3 cups)
15 oz can black beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Add garlic and cumin; cook for 30 seconds.
3. Stir in rice.
4. Add chicken broth, water, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer covered for 20 minutes.
6. Stir in the beans; cook covered until beans are hot, about 2 more minutes.
7. Transfer to a serving dish and sprinkle with cilantro.
8. Serve with Jerk Chicken.
